---
title: "Diseño General - Editor Tipográfico Offline"
format: html
toc: true
number-sections: true
lang: es
---

# Documento Maestro

Este archivo compila toda la documentación funcional y técnica del proyecto.

{{< include 00-proyecto-general.qmd >}}

{{< include 10-dominio-general.qmd >}}

{{< include 11-dominio-agregados.qmd >}}

{{< include 12-dominio-value-objects.qmd >}}

{{< include 13-dominio-puertos.qmd >}}

{{< include 14-template-svg-spec.qmd >}}

{{< include 15-normalizacion-geometrica.qmd >}}

{{< include 16-export-readiness-policy.qmd >}}

{{< include 17-snapshot-versionado.qmd >}}

{{< include 18-matriz-errores.qmd >}}

{{< include 20-aplicacion-casos-de-uso.qmd >}}

{{< include 21-fsm-tablas.qmd >}}

{{< include 22-casos-uso-algoritmos.qmd >}}

{{< include 23-fsm-actions-contratos.qmd >}}

{{< include 30-infraestructura.qmd >}}

{{< include 31-export-ttf-spec.qmd >}}

{{< include 32-cancelacion-timeout.qmd >}}

{{< include 33-ui-pantallas-flujos.qmd >}}

{{< include 34-estructura-carpetas-archivos.qmd >}}

{{< include 40-estrategia-pruebas.qmd >}}

{{< include 41-fixtures-golden.qmd >}}
